_comment: darkmux profile registry — example. Four general-purpose reference profiles in increasing capacity order: fast → balanced → deep → gpt-oss, plus three review-funnel-dedicated profiles (devstral, qwen3.6-27b-review, judge-35b-moe — see `_crews_comment` below) that staff the `review-deep` crew. A profile's `models[]` are WORKER models (no `role` field — #590); the machine's standing utility/compactor model lives once in the top-level `internal.utility` binding, not per-profile. `default_model` (optional) names a profile's default worker when it lists more than one; with a single model it's implicit. Replace the model ids with what you have downloaded in LMStudio (run `lms ls`).

fast.description: Single-turn tasks. Slim worker — fastest dispatch, lowest RAM.

balanced.description: Mid-range tasks. Predictable behavior across mixed workloads; compaction runs on the machine's internal.utility model.

deep.description: Long agentic tasks. Maximum worker context for fewer compactions.

gpt-oss.description: OpenAI gpt-oss-120b (MXFP4 quantization) for Apple Silicon — worker at 100K. Requires OpenClaw >= v2026.5.9-beta.1 (harmony format / tool-payload fix).

devstral.description: Review funnel — probe seat, plain draws. Dense wide-instruct model, no reasoning trace.

qwen3.6-27b-review.description: Review funnel — probe seat, bundle-scoped draws. A second, distinct dense wide-instruct model so the probe seat isn't a single point of view.

judge-35b-moe.description: Review funnel — judge seat. MoE reasoner weighing the probe seat's findings; deliberately its own profile/model so it never doubles as a probe.

_crews_comment: crews[] (#1222) — saved crew assignments: which models staff which crew-role seats, for multi-seat pipelines (e.g. a review funnel's probe + judge seats). `seats` is keyed by crew role id (crates/darkmux-crew's role vocabulary). Each seat's value is a list of staffings — a profile + optional explicit model id (absent = that profile's default model), draws-per-item `k` (default 3), and an optional bundle_selector scoping which fact families a staffing draws from. Local-only in v1: a staffing naming a model with a remote endpoint fails validation.

review-deep.description: Deep review lineup, three distinct models: two probe staffings (one plain, one bundle-scoped) on their own dense wide-instruct profiles, plus a judge staffing on its own MoE-reasoner profile. Mirrors the runner example in .github/DARKMUX_REVIEW_RUNNER.md.
